personal.name: Karthik Cherupally
personal.bio: I’m a Computer Science student specializing in Data Science, building practical solutions across machine learning, full stack development, frontend development, and edge AI.

about.highlight: I build practical systems across machine learning, full stack development, and edge AI with a focus on real world use cases.
about.heading: Hi, I'm Karthik Cherupally.
paragraphs: I'm a B.Tech student in Computer Science and Engineering Data Science at VNR VJIET, with hands on experience in ML, web development, databases, and project based problem solving.

My work includes diabetes prediction, QR based healthcare access, farmer advisory platforms, and edge AI prototypes. I like building projects end to end, from understanding the problem to developing models, interfaces, and working prototypes.

bullets: Built a diabetes prediction model using Random Forest on 5,000+ patient records, achieving 85% accuracy through preprocessing, feature engineering, and model evaluation.
Performed exploratory data analysis using Pandas & Seaborn and identified 4 high-impact risk features, improving model precision by 12%.
Supported 4+ technical workshops reaching 300+ students across the college community.
Created 10+ branding and event assets for workshops, student events, and club promotions.
